articles.title: Australian trade balance highlights a light Asia-Pacific calendar. Eyes on Korea
articles.expand: The Asia-Pacific economic calendar has only one highlight today and that's the Australian January trade balance in goods report. The consensus is a surplus of A$3.9 billion, in a solid improvement from +$3.337 billion in December. Yesterday's price action in AUD was strange as it was a laggard despite the stronger GDP number. I tend to think the dr...
articles.ai_headline: Balance comercial australiano de enero espera superávit de A$3.9 mil millones: mejora desde A$3.337 mil millones en diciembre → AUD alcista

articles.title: Aluminum Surges to Near 4-Year High
articles.expand: Aluminum futures in the UK climbed to $3,340 per tonne in March, the highest level in nearly four years, as the war in the Middle East intensified an already tight supply situation. Iranian strikes on targets across all GCC countries prompted major producers to suspend aluminum refining, threatening a broader halt to operations in a region that acc...
articles.ai_headline: Aluminio sube a máximos de casi 4 años en $3,340 por tonelada: guerra en Medio Oriente reduce oferta y aumenta aversión al riesgo → USD alcista

articles.title: investingLive Americas FX news wrap 4 Mar: Markets ignoring geopolitical risks. Data beat.
articles.expand: Major US stock indices close higher as the market discounts the geopolitical risks Bitcoin blasts through Key resistance. 38.2% retracement at $74,400 in sight Fed Beige Book: Overall economic activity increased at a slight/ moderate pace European indices rebound after two days of sharp declines White House submits nomination of Kevin Warsh for Fed...
articles.ai_headline: Mercados ignoran riesgos geopolíticos, índices bursátiles estadounidenses cierran con ganancias, Fed Beige Book muestra actividad económica en ritmo moderado → USD alcista

articles.title: Heating Oil Halts Major Rally
articles.expand: US heating oil futures edged down to $3.23 per gallon, hovering near their highest levels since September 2023, as large domestic inventory builds partly offset geopolitical risk. EIA data showed an unexpected 0.4 million-barrel increase in distillate stocks for the week ended February 27th, compared with expectations for a 2.6 million-barrel draw....
articles.ai_headline: Inventario de combustible para calefacción sube 0.4 millones de barriles en la semana del 27 de febrero: riesgo geopolítico parcialmente compensado por aumento de existencias → USD bajista

articles.title: Watchlist Update: AUD/CHF Pullback Setup Emerges
articles.expand: Australia’s strong GDP masked consumer weakness. With Middle East tensions driving severe risk-off sentiment globally, AUD/CHF presents a tactical pullback opportunity for short-term traders at key resistance.
articles.ai_headline: Tensiones en Medio Oriente intensifican sentimiento de riesgo: oportunidad de retroceso en AUD/CHF en resistencia clave → AUD bajista

articles.title: Treasury Yields Rise for 3rd Day
articles.expand: The yield on the US 10-year Treasury note edged up 2 bps to 4.09% on Wednesday, marking a third straight session of gains as investors digested developments in the Iran conflict, tariff news, and fresh economic data. According to a New York Times report, Iranian operatives have signaled a willingness to discuss terms for ending the conflict, prompt...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento de la deuda estadounidense a 10 años sube por tercer día consecutivo: inversores reaccionan a noticias de conflicto y datos económicos → USD alcista

articles.title: Forex Today: US Dollar eases despite strong jobs and Services PMI data
articles.expand: The US Dollar (USD) eased on Wednesday after a two-day rally drove the US Dollar Index (DXY) near the 100.00 mark. The Greenback ignored the positive employment data and ISM Services PMI as the ongoing war between the US and Iran weights on sentiment.
articles.ai_headline: Dólar estadounidense retrocede pese a datos de empleo y PMI de servicios positivos: tensión geopolítica con Irán pesa sobre el sentimiento → USD bajista

articles.title: EUR/USD Analysis on March 4, 2026
articles.expand: The wave pattern on the 4-hour chart for EUR/USD has taken on a less desirable form, but it still raises no major questions. There is still no talk of canceling the upward trend segment that began in January last year; only the internal wave structure is occasionally adjusted. In my view, the pair has completed the formation of global wave 4 (lower...
articles.ai_headline: Patrón de onda en EUR/USD mantiene tendencia alcista iniciada en enero del año pasado: ajuste interno de la estructura de onda sin cambios en la tendencia general → EUR alcista

articles.title: GBP/USD. Smart Money. The Pound Awaits Support from the U.S. Labor Market
articles.expand: The GBP/USD pair continues to decline within a broader bullish trend. The only valid pattern at the moment remains bearish imbalance 16, but bulls were short by just 6–7 points from touching it last week and forming a signal. As a result, traders had no reason to open short positions, even though the pound has since fallen by 250 points. It is also...
articles.ai_headline: Declive de GBP/USD dentro de tendencia alcista mayor: patrón de desequilibrio bajista 16, con caída de 250 puntos → GBP bajista

articles.title: Crude Oil Retreats From Over 1-Year Highs
articles.expand: WTI crude oil futures slipped toward $74 per barrel on Wednesday, pulling back from a more than one-year high and marking their first decline since the outbreak of direct conflict, as government assurances to protect key trade routes eased immediate supply concerns. The crisis has effectively choked off commercial traffic through the Strait of Horm...
articles.ai_headline: Retirada del petróleo WTI de máximos de más de un año: disminución de preocupaciones sobre suministro debido a garantías gubernamentales → USD bajista

articles.title: EUR/USD. Smart Money. The Market Has Stabilized, and the Euro Is Under Conflicting Pressures
articles.expand: During the first two days of the week, the EUR/USD pair was declining, but on Wednesday dollar buying eased somewhat. We have already seen the market's initial reaction to developments in the Middle East, and it was hardly encouraging. The bullish picture for EUR/USD has either been seriously damaged or significantly altered. We witnessed a clear c...
articles.ai_headline: Tensión en Medio Oriente afecta la percepción del riesgo: presión sobre la zona euro se mantiene → EUR bajista

articles.title: Pronóstico de la Plata: El XAG/USD rebota a medida que la guerra impulsa la demanda de activos refugio
articles.expand: La Plata (XAG/USD) avanza el miércoles, cotizando alrededor de 83.80$ al momento de escribir, con un aumento del 1.60% en el día. El metal precioso está rebotando tras una fuerte corrección observada en los dos días anteriores, durante los cuales los precios cayeron drásticamente en medio de una liquidación generalizada en los metales preciosos.
articles.ai_headline: XAG/USD rebota un 1.60% a 83.80$ impulsado por demanda de refugio en medio de tensión geopolítica: activos de riesgo bajo presión → NZD bajista

articles.title: El USD/JPY cae desde máximos de un mes a medida que se desvanece la fortaleza del Dólar estadounidense
articles.expand: El Yen japonés (JPY) cotiza al alza frente al Dólar estadounidense (USD) el miércoles, ya que el Dólar hace una pausa tras dos días de fuertes ganancias, lo que permite al Yen recuperarse modestamente. Sin embargo, el sentimiento del mercado sigue siendo cauteloso en medio de las crecientes tensiones por la guerra entre EE.UU. e Irán
articles.ai_headline: USD/JPY cae desde máximos de un mes: Dólar estadounidense se debilita permitiendo una modesta recuperación del Yen japonés → JPY alcista

articles.title: Australian Dollar Price Forecast: Next on the upside comes 0.7100
articles.expand: Sticky domestic inflation and a Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) that is in no rush to soften its hawkish stance continue to provide an underlying cushion for the Australian Dollar (AUD) for now, keeping the door open to further gains and limiting the downside.
articles.ai_headline: Inflación interna estable y RBA con postura hawkish: objetivo a corto plazo en 0.7100 → AUD alcista

articles.title: BoE: El impacto energético retrasa el camino hacia la flexibilización – Rabobank
articles.expand: El Estratega Macro Senior de Rabobank, Stefan Koopman, argumenta que el reciente aumento en los precios del Petróleo y del gas natural ha descarrilado las expectativas de recortes en las tasas del Banco de Inglaterra a corto plazo, con la tasa de interés oficial ahora considerada sin cambios hasta 2026.
articles.ai_headline: Aumento de precios del petróleo y gas natural retrasa expectativas de recortes de tasas del BoE: política monetaria restrictiva se mantiene más tiempo → GBP alcista

articles.title: BoE: Energy shock delays easing path – Rabobank
articles.expand: Rabobank’s Senior Macro Strategist Stefan Koopman argues that the recent surge in Oil and natural gas prices has derailed expectations for near-term Bank of England rate cuts, with the policy rate now seen on hold through 2026.
articles.ai_headline: Alza en precios de petróleo y gas natural retrasa expectativa de recortes de tasas del BoE: política monetaria en espera hasta 2026 → GBP alcista

articles.title: Canada: Growth gap versus United States seen widening – NBC
articles.expand: National Bank of Canada (NBC) economist Taylor Schleich highlights that since 2022, U.S. real GDP growth have outpaced Canada.
articles.ai_headline: Brecha de crecimiento entre Canadá y EEUU se amplía: desempeño económico relativo debilita la moneda canadiense → CAD bajista

articles.title: UK: Energy shock risks complicating BoE cuts – Deutsche Bank
articles.expand: Deutsche Bank’s Sanjay Raja and Shreyas Gopal warn that renewed energy price shocks are clouding the UK inflation outlook. They note that Oil and gas prices have surged, and that around half of the UK CPI basket is now highly energy‑intensive, especially services.
articles.ai_headline: Choques de energía en Reino Unido complican recortes del BoE: inflación por servicios energía-intensivos → GBP bajista

articles.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: Sentiment remains fragile, US Dollar eases
articles.expand: The EUR/USD pair finally found a near-term bottom, currently trading at around 1.1640 after falling to 1.1530 on Tuesday. The market mood remains wary as the Middle East crisis intensifies, albeit crude oil prices seem to have stabilized, bringing a bit of fresh air.
articles.ai_headline: Tensión en Medio Oriente se intensifica: inestabilidad geopolítica mantiene a la zona euro bajo presión → EUR bajista

articles.title: Probability of stagflation in Japan rises sharply
articles.expand: Japan's energy security moved to the forefront after the US. and Israel struck Iran, forcing previously dominant items on the agenda — wage negotiations with unions, reforms and consumption tax, and the Bank of Japan's policy rate — to the sidelines. Suddenly far greater stakes emerged: the threat of a sharp rise in inflation, a slowdown in GDP gro...
articles.ai_headline: Amenaza de estancamiento inflacionario en Japón aumenta bruscamente: inestabilidad energética y riesgo de inflación elevada → JPY bajista

articles.title: Canada's Q4 GDP notably worse than forecasts. BoC rate expectations unchanged for now
articles.expand: Canada's economy contracted by 0.6% in the fourth quarter, below the Bank of Canada's forecast of flat growth and the consensus expectation of a milder 0.2% decline versus Q3. For the year 2025, Canada's economy expanded by 1.7%, down from 2.0% in 2024. Preliminary expectations for Q1 of the current year are for +0.7%, but such forecasts should be ...
articles.ai_headline: Contracción del PIB canadiense en el Q4 supera expectativas de declive: crecimiento económico debilitado mantiene presión sobre el CAD → CAD bajista

articles.ai_headline: Análisis técnico confirma entrada alcista en 1.3327 con MACD en ascenso: señal de compra para la libra → GBP alcista

articles.title: EUR/USD. Williams's dovish signals, accelerating CPI in euro area, and Middle East escalation
articles.expand: The euro/dollar pair extended to a multi-month low yesterday, hitting 1.1530, the weakest price since 25 November last year. Sellers stood only forty pips from the powerful support at 1.1490, which corresponds to the lower line of the Bollinger Bands on the W1 timeframe. Yet, as the pair approached the 1.15 area, traders began taking profits and th...
articles.ai_headline: Señales de Williams dovish, inflación CPI acelerada en zona euro y escalada en Medio Oriente: presión vendedora sobre el euro → EUR bajista

articles.title: Level and Target Adjustments for the U.S. Session – March 4th
articles.expand: Today, only the euro was effectively traded using the Mean Reversion strategy. Through the Momentum strategy, I traded the Japanese yen, which continued to recover its positions against the dollar. After two days of the sharpest decline in the euro and the pound, strong data on activity in the services sector of the eurozone and the United Kingdom ...

articles.title: EUR/USD Forecast: Euro struggles to rebound as Middle East crisis deepens
articles.expand: EUR/USD remained under heavy bearish pressure for the second consecutive day on Tuesday and closed deep in negative territory.
articles.ai_headline: Crisis en Medio Oriente se profundiza: presión vendedora sobre la zona euro → EUR bajista

articles.title: Eurozone February final services PMI 51.9 vs 51.8 prelim

In particular, Germany looks to be one to help shoulder the economic burden after having been the main drag for a long time. The only troubling spot is perhaps that there is a notable rise in cost ...
articles.ai_headline: PMI de servicios de la zona euro en febrero se mantiene en 51.9: economía muestra resistencia con mejora en la demanda y aportación de Alemania → EUR alcista

articles.title: GBP/USD. March 4th. The Pound Continues to Suffer Due to the War in Iran
articles.expand: On the hourly chart, the GBP/USD pair continued its decline on Tuesday and consolidated below the 1.3341–1.3352 support level based on the new Fibonacci grid. Thus, the downward movement may continue toward the 1.3199–1.3214 support level. A consolidation above the 1.3341–1.3352 level would work in favor of the British pound and allow for some grow...
articles.ai_headline: GBP/USD cae por debajo de 1.3341-1.3352: guerra en Irán y debilidad técnica en el par → GBP bajista

articles.title: Swiss CPI rises 0.6% mom in February, annual inflation holds at 0.1%
articles.expand: Switzerland’s consumer prices rose more than expected in February, offering a modest sign of price pressure despite still subdued annual inflation. Data from the Federal Statistical Office showed CPI increased 0.6% mom, slightly above the expected 0.5% gain. Core CPI, which excludes fresh and seasonal products as well as energy and fuel, rose by 0....
articles.ai_headline: Inflación suiza sube 0.6% en febrero: presión moderada sobre precios → CHF alcista

articles.title: Switzerland February CPI +0.1% vs -0.1% y/y expected
articles.expand: Prior +0.1% Core CPI +0.4% y/y Prior +0.5% Headline annual inflation remains unchanged and continues to border on deflation territory. The bad news for the SNB is that core annual inflation is seen trickling lower to 0.4%. For some context, core annual inflation was still hovering at 0.9% in February 2025. It's a slow descend but one that continues...
articles.ai_headline: Inflación anual en Suiza se mantiene baja en 0.1%: presión sobre el SNB para mantener política acomodaticia → CHF bajista

articles.title: BOJ governor Ueda says wage increases much needed to get inflation to price target
articles.expand: Wages need to increase significantly for Japan to sustainably, stably achieve BOJ price target Mechanism in which wages, prices rise in tandem needs to become embedded in the economy What is most important in raising real wages is to increase labour productivity It is hard to directly influence real wages with monetary policy It is difficult to set...
articles.ai_headline: Gobernador del BOJ Ueda destaca necesidad de aumentos salariales significativos para alcanzar meta de inflación: política monetaria tiene limitaciones para influir directamente en salarios reales → JPY bajista

articles.title: Australia Q4 GDP beats with 0.8% qoq growth, reinforcing RBA demand concerns
articles.expand: Australia’s economy expanded faster than expected in the fourth quarter, reinforcing concerns that domestic demand may still be running hotter than the RBA would like. GDP grew 0.8% qoq, beating forecasts of 0.7% and accelerating from the previous quarter’s 0.5% pace. On an annual basis, growth came in at 2.6% yoy, also above expectations of [&#823...
articles.ai_headline: PIB de Australia sube 0.8% trimestral en Q4 superando expectativas: crecimiento anual de 2.6% refuerza preocupaciones del RBA sobre demanda interna → AUD alcista

articles.title: Oil back to $100? The Hormuz disruption holds the key
articles.expand: Oil’s market reaction has been immediate and sharp. The market is no longer pricing in a simple rise in tensions, but the de facto paralysis of the world’s most strategic energy corridor: the Strait of Hormuz.
articles.ai_headline: Disrupción en el Estrecho de Ormuz eleva precios del petróleo: Nueva Zelanda importa petróleo refinado y crudo → NZD bajista

articles.title: USDCAD Technicals:USDCAD was pulled higher by the USD, but higher oil is now pulling lower
articles.expand: The USD/CAD is currently locked in a tug-of-war as technical support meets a sharp fundamental shift in energy markets. While broad US Dollar strength provided an early lift, the pair has encountered a significant "ceiling" that remains unbroken. The Fundamental Context: Oil vs. Greenback The primary catalyst for the recent reversal is a 7.3% surge...
articles.ai_headline: Alza del 7.3% en el precio del petróleo: presión compradora sobre el CAD por mayor valor de exportaciones → CAD alcista
